title: Ghost vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Ghost vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Ghost and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Ghost is built for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_a: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses
comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Ghost wins for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Ghost or Privy?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Ghost?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
